nodes.name: Load markdown file
nodes.description: Reads a markdown file from the agent directory and returns its content as a string.

nodes.name: Summarize tool input
nodes.description: Extracts a concise summary of tool input data, prioritizing specific keys like pattern and file_path, and truncating long command strings.

nodes.name: Write debug output files
nodes.description: Writes multiple debug output files to disk including results, logs, and execution info, then prints their file paths.

nodes.name: Run integration analyzer
nodes.description: Runs an AI agent to analyze a project and find integration points, processing messages and optionally saving debug logs. Returns the final analysis result or None if an error occurred.

nodes.name: Execute CLI tool
nodes.description: Parses command-line arguments and invokes the integration point finder on the specified project path. Exits with an error code if the operation fails.

nodes.name: Create GitHub App JWT
nodes.description: Generates a short-lived JWT token for GitHub App authentication with a 10-minute expiration window.

nodes.name: Fetch installation access token
nodes.description: Exchanges a JWT for a GitHub App installation access token by calling the GitHub API.

nodes.name: Build auth headers
nodes.description: Creates HTTP headers with GitHub API authentication token for authorized API requests.

nodes.name: Add comment reaction
nodes.description: Adds a reaction emoji to a GitHub comment via the API.

nodes.name: Delete comment
nodes.description: Removes a comment from a GitHub repository.

nodes.name: Check write permission
nodes.description: Checks if a user has write-level or higher permissions on a repository.

nodes.name: Post PR comment
nodes.description: Posts a new comment on a pull request in a GitHub repository.

nodes.name: Update comment text
nodes.description: Updates the text content of an existing GitHub comment.

nodes.name: Execute PR analysis pipeline
nodes.description: Runs the full PR analysis asynchronously, uploads results to Supabase, and posts or updates a PR comment with the analysis diagram URL or completion status.

nodes.name: Process webhook and trigger analysis
nodes.description: Validates GitHub webhook signatures, verifies user registration and permissions, creates an analysis record, and asynchronously invokes the analysis handler when /unslop_analyze command is detected on a PR.

nodes.name: Update or post comment
nodes.description: Updates an existing PR comment with results, or posts a new comment as a fallback if the update fails.

nodes.name: Validate webhook signature
nodes.description: Verifies GitHub webhook request authenticity by comparing the request signature against an HMAC-SHA256 hash of the payload.

nodes.name: Route Lambda events
nodes.description: Dispatches incoming Lambda events to either the webhook handler or analysis handler based on event structure.

nodes.name: Fetch GitHub App secrets
nodes.description: Retrieves GitHub App secrets from AWS Secrets Manager and caches them in-memory for subsequent Lambda invocations.

nodes.name: Format API headers
nodes.description: Constructs HTTP headers dictionary with API key and Bearer authorization token for Supabase REST API requests.

nodes.name: Update analysis completion
nodes.description: Sends a PATCH request to mark an analysis as finished, updating its result path, cost, and finished_at timestamp in Supabase.

nodes.name: Create new analysis record
nodes.description: Sends a POST request to create a new analysis record in Supabase and returns the generated analysis UUID.

nodes.name: Look up user ID by GitHub ID
nodes.description: Calls a Supabase RPC function to retrieve the Supabase user ID corresponding to a given GitHub user ID, returning None if not found.

nodes.name: Aggregate cost from files
nodes.description: Reads multiple markdown files and sums all cost_usd values to calculate the total analysis cost.

nodes.name: Upload results to storage
nodes.description: Uploads analysis output files to the Supabase storage bucket for the given analysis ID.

nodes.name: Wrap prompt as async stream
nodes.description: Converts a string prompt into an AsyncIterable format for SDK MCP server compatibility.

nodes.name: Generate d2 diagram content
nodes.description: Builds d2 diagram syntax from node and edge data structures, filtering connected nodes and applying styling.

nodes.name: Load markdown file
nodes.description: Reads and returns the text content from a markdown file in the agent directory.

nodes.name: Create timestamped debug directory
nodes.description: Creates a new directory with current timestamp in TEST_DIR for storing debug output files.

nodes.name: Create diagram building tools
nodes.description: Generates add_node and add_edge tool functions with closure-based shared state for accumulating diagram elements.

nodes.name: Sanitize text for d2 labels
nodes.description: Escapes and replaces special characters to make text safe for use in d2 diagram labels and tooltips.

nodes.name: Convert name to valid d2 identifier
nodes.description: Transforms human-readable names into valid d2 identifiers by removing special characters and lowercasing.

nodes.name: Summarize tool input for logging
nodes.description: Creates concise string representations of tool arguments for display in short-form logs.

nodes.name: Write debug output files
nodes.description: Saves agent execution logs, results, and metadata to markdown files in the output directory.

nodes.name: Add edge to diagram
nodes.description: Creates a directed edge between two nodes with validation that both endpoints exist in the node registry.

nodes.name: Add node to diagram
nodes.description: Creates a new diagram node with type, status, and description, preventing duplicate node IDs.

nodes.name: Generate execution flow diagram
nodes.description: Orchestrates agent interaction to analyze PR changes and build an execution flow diagram from tool results.

nodes.name: Parse arguments and generate diagram
nodes.description: Entry point that parses command-line arguments and initiates diagram generation from a PR summary file.

nodes.name: Orchestrate PR analysis
nodes.description: Clones a PR repository, traces its execution flows, and generates a flow diagram. Returns the diagram content and directory containing analysis results.

nodes.name: Parse arguments and analyze
nodes.description: Entry point that validates command-line arguments and executes PR analysis, exiting with appropriate status codes.

nodes.name: Create timestamped directory
nodes.description: Creates a new output directory with a timestamp-based name for storing PR analysis results.

nodes.name: Parse GitHub PR URL
nodes.description: Extracts owner, repository, and PR number from a GitHub PR URL using regex matching.

nodes.name: Execute subprocess command
nodes.description: Runs a shell command with error handling, timeout support, and optional environment variables.

nodes.name: Parse CLI arguments
nodes.description: Entry point that processes command-line arguments and invokes the PR reader with appropriate options.

nodes.name: Fetch PR metadata and diff
nodes.description: Orchestrates cloning a repository, fetching PR metadata and diffs, and exporting the information to markdown and patch files.

nodes.name: Load markdown content
nodes.description: Reads and returns the text content of a markdown file from the agent configuration directory.

nodes.name: Create timestamped debug directory
nodes.description: Generates a new directory with a timestamp-based name for storing debug output and analysis logs.

nodes.name: Extract tool input summary
nodes.description: Extracts a concise summary string from tool input data for compact logging representation.

nodes.name: Write debug output files
nodes.description: Persists analysis logs, results, and metadata files to the debug output directory with formatted content.

nodes.name: Parse CLI and start analysis
nodes.description: Parses command-line arguments and initiates the PR analysis workflow after validating input.

nodes.name: Run AI-powered PR analysis
nodes.description: Orchestrates the full PR analysis by streaming an AI agent's iterative interaction, collecting results across multiple turns.

nodes.name: Collect function calls
nodes.description: Recursively walks AST nodes to collect all function calls within a function body, excluding nested function definitions.

nodes.name: Extract called function name
nodes.description: Extracts the bare function or method name from a call expression node, handling identifiers, attributes, and member expressions.

nodes.name: Find all file functions
nodes.description: Finds all named function definitions in a file's AST, returning qualified names (with class context) and their nodes.

nodes.name: Get function call map
nodes.description: Extracts all direct calls from a function body, returning a dictionary mapping call names to whether their return value is used.

nodes.name: Create language parser
nodes.description: Creates a tree-sitter parser for the specified language (Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, TSX).

nodes.name: Iterate source files
nodes.description: Yields all supported source files from a repository path, skipping common non-source directories like node_modules.

nodes.name: Walk and collect functions
nodes.description: Recursively traverses an AST to collect all function definitions with their qualified names (including class context) for multiple languages.

nodes.name: Build repository call graph
nodes.description: Analyzes a repository to build a function call graph, classifying functions as start_points, end_points, processes, or orphans based on their call relationships.

nodes.name: Collect reachable nodes
nodes.description: Performs a depth-first search from entry node IDs within a scope to identify all reachable nodes in the call graph.

nodes.name: Format edge syntax
nodes.description: Formats a single edge between nodes as a Mermaid diagram line, handling labels and arrow styling for returned vs. non-returned edges.

nodes.name: Format node syntax
nodes.description: Formats a single node as a Mermaid diagram definition with appropriate shape, label, and styling based on node type and sub-diagram status.

nodes.name: Render flat diagram
nodes.description: Generates a complete Mermaid diagram by rendering all nodes and edges in a flat structure without sub-diagram splitting.

nodes.name: Sanitize node ID
nodes.description: Converts a call graph node ID to a valid Mermaid identifier by removing or replacing invalid characters and consolidating underscores.

nodes.name: Escape label text
nodes.description: Escapes special characters in text to make it safe for use inside Mermaid diagram labels.

nodes.name: Split diagram recursively
nodes.description: Recursively splits a large call graph diagram into a main diagram and sub-diagrams, with special handling for returned vs. non-returned edges to prevent exceeding node limits.

nodes.name: Generate sub-diagram name
nodes.description: Generates a unique, filename-safe name for a sub-diagram based on the root node, avoiding collisions with existing sub-diagram names.

nodes.name: Build mermaid diagrams
nodes.description: Main entry point that builds a collection of Mermaid diagrams from an enriched call graph, filtering out test and orphan nodes and coordinating the diagram generation process.

nodes.name: Traverse and partition nodes
nodes.description: Nested DFS visitor function that recursively traverses nodes and partitions them between main and sub-diagrams based on edge types and size thresholds.

nodes.name: Apply parsed results to edges
nodes.description: Applies parsed JSON results to edge dictionaries by ID, returning completion count and any errors.

nodes.name: Convert prompt to stream
nodes.description: Converts a prompt text into an async stream of user message dictionaries for the agent.

nodes.name: Build analysis prompt
nodes.description: Constructs a formatted prompt with caller function code and callees for agent edge analysis.

nodes.name: Extract JSON from text
nodes.description: Extracts a JSON array from agent output using regex patterns with fallback strategies.

nodes.name: Load markdown file
nodes.description: Reads and returns the text content of a markdown file from the agent directory.

nodes.name: Run edge builder agent
nodes.description: Orchestrates edge analysis for a single caller by querying the agent, extracting results, and populating edges with metadata.

nodes.name: Extract file path from ID
nodes.description: Extracts the file path component from a node ID by splitting on the '::' delimiter.

nodes.name: Run with concurrency limit
nodes.description: Wraps a coroutine execution with a semaphore to enforce concurrent operation limits.

nodes.name: Write agent results log
nodes.description: Writes a consolidated log file containing per-item results, errors, and aggregated statistics for batch agent operations.

nodes.name: Enrich graph with agent analysis
nodes.description: Orchestrates concurrent enrichment of call graph nodes and edges through batched agent processing with rate limiting.

nodes.name: Apply parsed results to nodes
nodes.description: Matches parsed JSON results to node dictionaries by index and updates them with name, description, and tag information. Returns completion count and any errors encountered.

nodes.name: Format prompt as message stream
nodes.description: Converts a prompt string into an async stream of user message dictionaries in the expected format for agent queries.

nodes.name: Build analysis prompt with source
nodes.description: Constructs a prompt string for the analysis agent by formatting function identifiers and inline source code from a list of node dictionaries.

nodes.name: Extract JSON from output text
nodes.description: Extracts a JSON array from agent output text by searching for JSON in code blocks or as standalone text using regex patterns.

nodes.name: Load markdown file contents
nodes.description: Reads and returns the contents of a markdown file from the agent directory.

nodes.name: Run node analysis for file
nodes.description: Orchestrates the entire node analysis workflow: loads system prompt, builds file-specific prompt, queries the Claude agent, extracts results, and applies metadata to nodes. Returns logs and statistics.

nodes.name: Clone git repository
nodes.description: Executes a git clone command with error handling for missing git executable and timeout conditions.

nodes.name: Build repository analysis
nodes.description: Orchestrates the complete analysis workflow: clones a repository, builds its call graph, enriches it with full tree data, and generates JSON results and mermaid diagrams.

nodes.name: Execute CLI analyzer
nodes.description: Entry point that parses command-line arguments for repository URL and output directory, then initiates the repository analysis workflow.

nodes.name: Generate diagram files
nodes.description: Reads call graph and start points from JSON files, generates Mermaid diagrams, and writes them to output files in the result directory.

edges.description: Recursively collect function calls from child node

edges.description: Get all function call names with is_returned flag from function body

edges.description: Yield all supported source files, skipping non-source directories

edges.description: Converts from_id to a valid mermaid identifier by removing special characters and collapsing underscores

edges.description: Formats an edge as a mermaid edge line

edges.description: Formats a node as a mermaid node definition line

edges.description: Renders an edge in the main diagram as a mermaid edge definition line

edges.description: Renders a target node as a mermaid node definition if not already emitted
edges.condition: if target not in emitted_nodes and node

edges.description: Recursively visits target node from a non-returned edge

edges.description: Convert root_id segment to filename-safe identifier by removing special characters

edges.description: Performs DFS from start points to find all reachable nodes in the call graph

edges.description: Renders all reachable nodes and edges as a single flat mermaid diagram

edges.description: Splits the call graph into a main diagram and sub-diagrams when it exceeds the node threshold

edges.description: Recursively visit the target node of an inline edge

edges.description: Recursively visit the target node of a non-returned edge

edges.description: Generate a unique filename-safe name for the sub-diagram

edges.description: Applies parsed JSON results to edge dictionaries by id, returning count of completed edges and any errors

edges.description: Converts the prompt text to an async generator stream format with user message structure

edges.description: Extracts and parses a JSON array from the agent's text output using regex patterns

edges.description: Runs the edge_builder agent to enrich edge properties for all edges from a single caller

edges.description: Extracts file path from node ID by splitting on '::' delimiter

edges.description: Wraps edge builder coroutine with semaphore for rate limiting across concurrent edge enrichment

edges.description: Runs the node_builder agent to enrich node properties for all nodes in a source file

edges.label: apply results

edges.description: Create an async stream with the prompt as a user message for the query

edges.description: Build the prompt for the node_builder agent with inline source code from nodes

edges.description: Extract and parse JSON array from the agent's text output

edges.description: Build a function call graph by analyzing the cloned repository

edges.description: Generate mermaid diagrams from the enriched call graph

edges.description: Enrich nodes and edges in the call graph with LLM analysis
